ingress: Det finns cirka 3200 yrkesverksamma kemister i Sverige, varav cirka 54 procent är kvinnor och 46 procent är män.
stycke1: Arbetsförmedlingen bedömer att det kommer vara  konkurrens om jobben för kemister under det närmaste året. Det innebär att personer som har den utbildning eller erfarenhet som krävs kommer ha små till medelstora möjligheter till arbete, men beroende på inriktning inom yrket kan arbetsmarknaden variera.
stycke2: På 2 års sikt bedömer Arbetsförmedlingen att möjligheterna till arbete för kemister kommer vara stora. Möjligheterna till arbete inom yrket ökar om du har relevanta certifikat, behörigheter eller yrkesbevis.
ingressEn: There are about 3,200 working chemists in Sweden, of whom about 54 percent are women and 46 percent are men.
stycke1En: The Swedish Public Employment Service assesses that there will be competition for jobs for chemists over the next year. This means that people with the required education or experience will have limited to moderate opportunities for work, but the labor market can vary depending on specialization within the occupation.
stycke2En: Over a two-year horizon, the Swedish Public Employment Service assesses that job opportunities for chemists will be good. Job opportunities within the occupation increase if you have relevant certificates, licenses, or professional credentials.

stycke2: På 2 års sikt bedömer Arbetsförmedlingen att möjligheterna till arbete för designer och utvecklare inom spel och digitala medier kommer vara mycket stora. Möjligheterna till arbete inom yrket ökar om du har relevanta certifikat, behörigheter eller yrkesbevis.
ingressEn: The assessment for game and digital media designers and developers is a combined assessment for game and digital media designers and game and digital media developers. There are about 6,500 working game and digital media designers and developers in Sweden, of whom about 21 percent are women and 79 percent are men.
stycke1En: The Swedish Public Employment Service assesses that there will be competition for jobs for game and digital media designers and developers over the next year. This means that people with the required education or experience will have limited to moderate opportunities for work, but the labor market can vary depending on specialization within the occupation.
stycke2En: Over a two-year horizon, the Swedish Public Employment Service assesses that job opportunities for game and digital media designers and developers will be very good. Job opportunities within the occupation increase if you have relevant certificates, licenses, or professional credentials.

ingressEn: The assessment for emergency care nurses is a combined assessment for nurse anesthetists, intensive care nurses, ambulance nurses, etc. There are about 10,100 working emergency care nurses in Sweden, of whom about 70 percent are women and 30 percent are men.
stycke1En: The Swedish Public Employment Service assesses that there will be very little competition for jobs for emergency care nurses over the next year. This means that people with the required education or experience will have very great opportunities for work, but the labor market can vary depending on specialization within the occupation.
stycke2En: Over a two-year horizon, the Swedish Public Employment Service assesses that job opportunities for emergency care nurses will be very good. Job opportunities within the occupation increase if you have relevant certificates, licenses, or professional credentials.

Det innebär att personer som har den utbildning eller erfarenhet som krävs kommer ha mycket stora möjligheter till arbete, men beroende på inriktning inom yrket kan arbetsmarknaden variera.
stycke2: På 2 års sikt bedömer Arbetsförmedlingen att möjligheterna till arbete för biomedicinska analytiker kommer vara mycket stora. Möjligheterna till arbete inom yrket ökar om du har relevanta certifikat, behörigheter eller yrkesbevis.
ingressEn: There are about 9,500 working biomedical analysts in Sweden, of whom about 85 percent are women and 15 percent are men.
stycke1En: The Swedish Public Employment Service assesses that there will be very little competition for jobs for biomedical analysts in the next year. This means that people with the required education or experience will have very good opportunities for work, although the labor market may vary depending on specialization within the profession.
stycke2En: In a two-year perspective, the Swedish Public Employment Service assesses that the opportunities for work for biomedical analysts will be very great. The chances of finding work in the profession increase if you have relevant certificates, authorizations, or professional credentials.

Det innebär att personer som har den utbildning eller erfarenhet som krävs kommer ha små till medelstora möjligheter till arbete, men beroende på inriktning inom yrket kan arbetsmarknaden variera.
stycke2: På 2 års sikt bedömer Arbetsförmedlingen att möjligheterna till arbete för ljud, ljus- och bildtekniker kommer vara stora. Möjligheterna till arbete inom yrket ökar om du har relevanta certifikat, behörigheter eller yrkesbevis.
ingressEn: The assessment for audio, lighting, and video technicians is a combined assessment for lighting, sound, and stage technicians, and image and broadcast technicians. There are approximately 4,400 employed audio, lighting, and video technicians in Sweden, of whom about 23 percent are women and 77 percent are men.
stycke1En: The Swedish Public Employment Service assesses that there will be competition for jobs for audio, lighting, and video technicians over the next year. This means that people with the required education or experience will have small to medium opportunities for work, but the labour market may vary depending on the specialization within the occupation.
stycke2En: Over a two-year horizon, the Swedish Public Employment Service assesses that the employment prospects for audio, lighting, and video technicians will be good. Job opportunities in the occupation increase if you have relevant certificates, authorizations, or professional credentials.

ingressEn: The assessment for machine operators in manufacturing is an overall assessment covering machine operators in cement, stone and concrete products; machine operators in the meat and fish processing industry; machine operators in the plastics industry; operators in sawmills, planing mills and plywood, etc.; machine operators in chemical-technical and photographic products; machine operators in the paper products industry; other machine operators in the textile, leather and hide industry; machine operators in dairies; other machine operators in the food industry, etc.; machine operators in the rubber industry; machine operators in the flour, bakery and confectionery industry; machine operators in surface treatment; rolling-mill operators; machine setters and machine operators in metal work; machine carpenters and machine operators in the wood industry; machine operators in surface treatment of wood; machine operators in bleaching, dyeing and washing; machine operators in filling, packing and labelling; manual surface finishers in wood; and machine operators in pharmaceutical products. There are about 115,000 employed machine operators in manufacturing in Sweden, of whom about 21 percent are women and 79 percent are men.

Det innebär att personer som har den utbildning eller erfarenhet som krävs kommer ha små till medelstora möjligheter till arbete, men beroende på inriktning inom yrket kan arbetsmarknaden variera.
stycke2: På 2 års sikt bedömer Arbetsförmedlingen att möjligheterna till arbete för montörer inom tillverkning kommer vara små till medelstora. Möjligheterna till arbete inom yrket ökar om du har relevanta certifikat, behörigheter eller yrkesbevis.
ingressEn: The assessment for assemblers in manufacturing is a combined assessment for vehicle assemblers; other assemblers; assemblers of metal, rubber and plastic products; assemblers of wood products; and assemblers of electrical and electronic equipment. There are about 51,500 employed assemblers in manufacturing in Sweden, of whom about 23 percent are women and 77 percent are men.
stycke1En: The Swedish Public Employment Service assesses that there will be competition for jobs as assemblers in manufacturing over the next year. This means that people with the required education or experience will have small to medium opportunities for work, but the labor market may vary depending on the specialization within the occupation.
stycke2En: Over a 2-year horizon, the Swedish Public Employment Service assesses that employment opportunities for assemblers in manufacturing will be small to medium. Opportunities in the occupation increase if you have relevant certificates, authorizations, or occupational credentials.

stycke2: På 2 års sikt bedömer Arbetsförmedlingen att möjligheterna till arbete för truckförare kommer vara stora. Möjligheterna till arbete inom yrket ökar om du har relevanta certifikat, behörigheter eller yrkesbevis.
ingressEn: There are about 10,700 employed forklift operators in Sweden, of whom about 14 percent are women and 86 percent are men.
stycke1En: The Swedish Public Employment Service assesses that there will be competition for jobs as forklift operators over the next year. This means that people with the required education or experience will have small to medium opportunities for work, but the labor market may vary depending on the specialization within the occupation.
stycke2En: Over a 2-year horizon, the Swedish Public Employment Service assesses that employment opportunities for forklift operators will be good. Opportunities in the occupation increase if you have relevant certificates, authorizations, or occupational credentials.

ingress: Det finns cirka 6300 yrkesverksamma vaktmästare i Sverige, varav cirka 18 procent är kvinnor och 82 procent är män.
stycke1: Arbetsförmedlingen bedömer att det kommer vara  konkurrens om jobben för vaktmästare under det närmaste året. Det innebär att personer som har den utbildning eller erfarenhet som krävs kommer ha små till medelstora möjligheter till arbete, men beroende på inriktning inom yrket kan arbetsmarknaden variera.
stycke2: På 2 års sikt bedömer Arbetsförmedlingen att möjligheterna till arbete för vaktmästare kommer vara små till medelstora. Möjligheterna till arbete inom yrket ökar om du har relevanta certifikat, behörigheter eller yrkesbevis.
ingressEn: There are around 6,300 employed caretakers in Sweden, of whom about 18 percent are women and 82 percent are men.
stycke1En: The Swedish Public Employment Service assesses that there will be competition for jobs as caretakers over the next year. This means that people with the required education or experience will have limited to moderate opportunities to find work, but the labor market may vary depending on the specialization within the occupation.
stycke2En: Over a 2-year horizon, the Swedish Public Employment Service assesses that job opportunities for caretakers will be limited to moderate. Job opportunities in the occupation increase if you have relevant certificates, authorizations, or professional credentials.
